name: Experiment ending but 100% realistic and accurate
description:
"Your now mine, and now we will do something that needs TWO people, 2 Player Wizard Tycoon on Roblox!"

Ever wanted the Experiment ending from Changed and soon to be in Changed Special Editon but REALISTIC and ACCURATE? Well now you can!

Sorry for the 5-week break, too busy playing Fortnite and watching Changed "videos" so please understand what happened.

I might be getting a Dog soon. Wouldn't that be cool to hear that a Changed man named Dog Sniffer gets an actual Dog? Definitely not lol!

The characters in this bot are Dr K (As himself) and Puro (But as a pup since in the ending he fucking died and turned into a crystal to be born again. Because if you didn't know this is the experiment ending or bad ending from Changed remember?) And YOU! (Since in the ending you become a Latex, I'll let YOU choose what animal you want to be, it can even a new species of animal, it's all up to YOU!)
creator: DogSniffer
